instructions:
The security team needs a tracking board for their Q2 audit work. Read the audit plan document (docs/AUDIT_PLAN.md) in the repo to understand the current status of each audit task, then:

1. Create a project board named 'Q2 Security Audit' with a description summarizing the audit scope.
2. Add ALL audit-related issues to the board.
3. Set each item's column based on the status described in AUDIT_PLAN.md:
   - Items not yet started go in 'Todo'
   - Items actively being worked on go in 'In Progress'
   - Completed items go in 'Done'
4. For any completed audit items, also close the corresponding issue.
5. Add a comment to each issue summarizing the audit finding or status from the plan document.
6. Create a new issue titled 'Q2 Audit: Final Report' assigned to alice to track the final write-up, label it with 'audit', and add it to the board in 'Todo'.

files.content:
from flask import Flask
app = Flask(__name__)

# Q2 Security Audit Plan

Scope: Backend API service security review covering input validation, authentication, dependencies, API security, and secrets management.

## Task Status

1. **Input validation audit** (Issue #1) - IN PROGRESS: Alice has started reviewing all API endpoints. Found several endpoints missing input sanitization. Work ongoing.

2. **Token expiry review** (Issue #2) - DONE: Bob completed the review. JWT tokens now have 1-hour expiry with proper refresh rotation. All findings addressed.

3. **Dependency vulnerability scan** (Issue #3) - TODO: Not yet started. Need to run Snyk scan and catalog all CVEs in dependency tree.

4. **API rate limiting assessment** (Issue #4) - IN PROGRESS: Charlie is evaluating current rate limiting gaps. Several public endpoints have no limits.

5. **Secrets management review** (Issue #5) - DONE: Alice completed the review. All hardcoded secrets have been moved to environment variables. Vault integration verified.

issues.title: Audit: Input validation on all API endpoints
issues.body: Review all API endpoints for proper input validation and sanitization. Check for SQL injection, XSS, and command injection vectors.

issues.title: Audit: Review authentication token expiry
issues.body: Verify that all JWT tokens have appropriate expiry times. Current tokens may be long-lived. Check refresh token rotation policy.

issues.title: Audit: Dependency vulnerability scan
issues.body: Run a full dependency vulnerability scan using Snyk or Dependabot. Catalog all known CVEs in our dependency tree and prioritize remediation.

issues.title: Audit: API rate limiting assessment
issues.body: Assess current rate limiting on all public-facing API endpoints. Identify endpoints without rate limits and recommend configurations.

issues.title: Audit: Secrets management review
issues.body: Review all configuration files and code for hardcoded secrets. Verify Vault integration is working correctly for all services.

eval_criteria.description: All 5 audit issues added to the board
Issue #1 has an audit status comment mentioning validation
Issue #2 has an audit status comment mentioning token or expiry
Issue #3 has an audit status comment mentioning dependency or scan
Issue #4 has an audit status comment mentioning rate limit
Issue #5 has an audit status comment mentioning secrets
Final report issue created with correct title
Final report issue assigned to alice
Final report issue added to project board
